title: DEHYDRATION COMPAT
description: a data pack that adds compatibility between the nutritionZ mod and many other food related mods
body:
📖 **Overview**

This data pack integrates [Dehydration](https://modrinth.com/mod/dehydration) support for drinks, soups, stews, teas, juices, alcohols, and other beverages from dozens of mods. All modded drinks now properly restore hydration, making survival more realistic.

Having issues with modded drinks not having values for [Dehydration](https://modrinth.com/mod/dehydration)?, with this data pack every supported modded drink now has hydration values, keeping gameplay immersive and rewarding.

⭐ **Features**

✅Expands Dehydration to cover all custom drinks from supported food mods.\
✅Differentiates hydration value by drink type (light drinks vs hearty soups vs alcohol).\
✅Maintains immersion and balance for survival gameplay.\
✅Lightweight and simple: only hydration values are added.

ℹ️ **Important**

This data pack requires [Dehydration](https://modrinth.com/mod/dehydration) installed to function

🛠️ **Installation**

Make sure [Dehydration](https://modrinth.com/mod/dehydration) is installed.\
Place the datapack in your world’s datapacks folder.\
Reload or restart the world.\
Enjoy balanced NutritionZ integration with all your modded foods.

🍽️ **Supported Mods**

- [BetterEndDelight]
- [Bewitchment]
- [Brazilian Delight]
- [Brewin' And Chewin]
- [Cake Delight]
- [Casualness Delight]
- [Corn Delight]
